name: Spiced & Ginger
title: Spiced Rum & Ginger Ale Cocktail Recipe | How to make a Spiced Rum & Ginger Ale Cocktail | BACARDÍ Global
short_description: A refreshing highball of BACARDÍ Spiced rum and ginger ale finished with lime.
marketing_description: Refresh with this snappy little number. BACARDÍ Spiced rum, bubbly ginger and a zesty hint of lime come together in one tasty cocktail.

steps: Fill a glass with ice cubes.
Pour in the BACARDÍ Spiced rum, followed by the ginger ale.
Give it all a gentle stir.

raw_text_excerpt: Ingredients 50 ml BACARDÍ Spiced rum 100 ml ginger ale ... 1 Chill Fill a glass with ice cubes. 2 Pour Pour in the BACARDÍ Spiced rum, followed by the ginger ale. 3 Stir Give it all a gentle stir. 4 Garnish Garnish with a lime wedge.

source_metadata.description: Learn how to make the best Spiced Rum & Ginger Ale Cocktail. Check out our BACARDÍ receipe and ingredient list here and start mixing!
